chapter_title.en: Chapter on the First and Final Departure From Mina

text: رِوَايَةِ اِبْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ اَلْأَحْوَلِ عَنْ سَلاَّمِ بْنِ اَلْمُسْتَنِيرِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : «لِمَنِ اِتَّقَى اَلرَّفَثَ وَ اَلْفُسُوقَ وَ اَلْجِدَالَ وَ مَا حَرَّمَ اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ فِي إِحْرَامِهِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3017 - In a narration from Ibn Mahbub, from Abu Ja'far al-Ahwal, from Salam ibn al-Mustaneer, from Abu Ja'far (as), he said:
"For the one who avoids indecency (rafath), wrongdoing (fisq), argumentation (jidal), and whatever Allah (swt) has prohibited for him during his state of ihram."
